summary: Crypto markets show consolidation with Bitcoin holding key supports amid mixed macro signals from US data and geopolitics, while gold faces short-term downside pressure before potential rebounds and forex pairs exhibit intraday setup opportunities. Altcoins display selective momentum in AI narratives, but broader sentiment remains cautious ahead of upcoming inflation releases. Commodities like oil remain volatile due to supply concerns.
